tool_purpose: A text-to-speech model trained on multiple datasets including mtedx, covost2, europarl_st, and voxpopuli. Supports English, Spanish, French, and Italian languages. Framework: Fairseq. Functionality: Text-to-Speech. API call: unit.TTS.from_pretrained('facebook/unit_hifigan_mhubert_vp_en_es_fr_it3_400k_layer11_km1000_es_css10').
usage_warnings: Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
